title: ThrustX
description:
Бесплатные выходныеYou can try ThrustX out for free in this summers Steam Next Fest!

Об игре

Unlock new fighters, improve your skills, and master unique playstyles as you progress. With a free season pass, new content continues to expand the experience, giving players fresh characters and challenges over time.

Step into a fast-paced 2.5D fighting game where every match is a test of skill, timing, and strategy. Battle through intense best-of-five round matches, where adapting to your opponent is the key to victory.

Fight solo or challenge your friends in peer-to-peer multiplayer, delivering smooth, direct matches with no middleman. Whether you're playing casually or competitively, every fight feels personal and rewarding.
description_short: Start as Santa. Unlock a pig, a cop and more. Beat each other senseless in a chaotic 2.5D brawler, with proximity chat, so you can hear them suffer. New fighters every season with a free season pass. Best of five. May the most unhinged player win.
